_comment: Copy to ~/.terminal-bevy/keybinds.json to override hotkeys. Keys are action ids (see the command palette / `ActionRegistry`). Values are `<mods>+<key>` chords; space-separated chords form a sequence. A `null` value unbinds an action that has a default. Run the `Reload Keybindings` action (or restart) to apply. Lines starting with `_` are ignored as unknown ids.
